step_rationale: Marker of fibrin turnover and coagulation-fibrinolytic balance in acute coronary thrombosis.
mechanism: Fibrin degradation products indicate active fibrinolytic remodeling and coagulation turnover during acute MI.

references.title: Pathway-Specific Aggregate Biomarker Risk Score Is Associated With Burden of Coronary Artery Disease and Predicts Near-Term Risk of Myocardial Infarction and Death.
